name: ProjectApi
summary: Connection Rest API 3.0 — Project endpoints. Auto-generated REST surface; one method per HTTP operation.

methods.name: OpenProjectAsync
methods.summary: Opens an IdeaCon project from the provided file.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: CloseProjectAsync
methods.summary: Closes the project and releases resources in the service.

params.name: projectId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the project to be closed.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: GetActiveProjectsAsync
methods.summary: Gets the list of projects in the service that were opened by the client connected via M:IdeaStatiCa.ConnectionRestApi.Controllers.ClientController.ConnectClient.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: CreateEmptyProjectAsync
methods.summary: Creates a new empty IdeaCon project with no connections.

params.name: conProjectData
params.doc: Optional project metadata. The DesignCode field determines the design code (e.g. \"ECEN\", \"American\", \"AUS\"). Defaults to ECEN if not provided.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: DownloadProjectAsync
methods.summary: Downloads the current IdeaCon project from the service, includingall changes made by previous API calls.

params.name: projectId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the opened project in the ConnectionRestApi service.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

params.name: projectId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the requested project

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.
Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ImportIOMAsync
methods.summary: Create the IDEA Connection project from IOM provided in xml format. nThe parameter 'containerXmlFile' passed in HTTP body represents : [IdeaRS.OpenModel.OpenModelContainer](https://github.com/idea-statica/ideastatica-public/blob/main/src/IdeaRS.OpenModel/OpenModelContainer.cs) nwhich is serialized to XML string by [IdeaRS.OpenModel.Tools.OpenModelContainerToXml](https://github.com/idea-statica/ideastatica-public/blob/main/src/IdeaRS.OpenModel/Tools.cs)

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: UpdateFromIOMAsync
methods.summary: Update the IDEA Connection project by [IdeaRS.OpenModel.OpenModelContainer](https://github.com/idea-statica/ideastatica-public/blob/main/src/IdeaRS.OpenModel/OpenModelContainer.cs) (model and results). IOM is passed in the body of the request as thexml string. [IdeaRS.OpenModel.Tools.OpenModelContainerToXml](https://github.com/idea-statica/ideastatica-public/blob/main/src/IdeaRS.OpenModel/Tools.cs)should be used to generate the valid xml string

params.name: projectId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the opened project in the ConnectionRestApi service to be updated

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.
